assumptions: The question concerns hedge accounting in consolidated financial statements under IFRS 9.
The intragroup dividend receivable is a foreign-currency-denominated intragroup monetary item or arises from a foreign-currency-denominated intragroup transaction.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies recognised assets and liabilities, including eligible intragroup monetary items in consolidated financial statements, as potential hedged items.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 separately identifies highly probable forecast transactions, including certain intragroup foreign-currency transactions in consolidated financial statements, as a distinct hedge accounting model.
